title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by company type
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Published medians are Agency / Consulting n=44 at S$63,548; Government n=11 at S$84,000; Large enterprise (MNC) n=81 at S$114,500; Small-medium enterprise n=18 at S$58,300; and Startup n=61 at S$90,000. Other company types are suppressed. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Company-type cohorts below n=10 are not published. Values are self-reported total compensation medians, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
